message:
feat(ufunc): extend fftshift/ifftshift to ND arrays

Support multi-dimensional arrays with axes parameter:
- fftshift() now shifts all axes by default (NumPy axes=None parity)
- fftshift_axes(Some(&[0, 2])) shifts selected axes only
- ifftshift/ifftshift_axes mirror the inverse behavior
- Uses roll() internally for each axis shift

Adds 4 new tests for ND array shifting and sidecar preservation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
